## Checklist

- [ ] I used an official proceedings or project URL.
- [ ] I updated the relevant Markdown page and CSV catalog.
- [ ] I identified modality, task, and evaluation assumptions.
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/validate_catalog.py`.
- [ ] I did not copy copyrighted abstracts, tables, or figures.
